claims.summary: Packet cadence and the felt texture between packets are different measurements.
claims.disposition: verify heartbeat cadence remains timing-specific while viscosity and permeability live on separate texture evidence surfaces

claims.summary: Hybrid coherence should retain directional numeric evidence rather than only a flat label.
claims.disposition: verify hybrid_coherence_index and hybrid_max_abs_delta remain present beside hybrid_coherence_state

claims.summary: Renaming cadence clarity to permeability would better name felt navigability.
claims.disposition: verify the current design intentionally keeps timing clarity distinct from stable_core_permeability_review_v1 and viscosity evidence

claims.summary: Felt viscosity should be compared with cadence and hybridity over a bounded time window.
claims.disposition: route a read-only temporal-association study without claiming direct causation or changing telemetry
